overview: Endocrinology clinic offering hormone replacement therapy for men and women through both online telehealth and local in-person clinics, with emphasis on subcutaneous injection protocols and comprehensive endocrine testing.
highlights: Comprehensive endocrine testing of 15+ hormones as standard protocol
Hybrid model: online telehealth and local in-person clinics
targetAudience: Men and women seeking comprehensive hormone optimization with long-term family health planning.
